mapper.insert: INSERT INTO news_table (id, title, content, author_id, like_count, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{authorId}, #{likeCount}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM news_table WHERE author_id = #{authorId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM news_table ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM news_table ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE news_table SET title = #{title}, content = #{content} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE news_table SET like_count = like_count + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
